name: Onion Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat soy milk with margarine, mustard, and dried minced onion until warm to touch (not scalding). Let cool to 120-130°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix undissolved yeast with sugar. Add 6 cups of flour, salt, pepper, and turmeric. Stir in seasoned soy milk. Mix well.
3. Gradually add wheat germ, then continue adding the remaining flour one cup at a time until well mixed. Form into a soft ball.
4. Turn dough out onto a floured surface and knead for about 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
5. Place in a greased bowl, turning to coat the dough. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 1 1/2 hours.
6. Punch down the dough and divide into 16 equal pieces. Shape into burger buns or hot dog buns. Place on cookie sheets sprayed with non-stick spray. Brush lightly with vegetable oil. Cover with saran wrap. Allow to rise about 45 minutes.
7. Bake in a 350°F oven for about 20 minutes, until golden brown. Cool on wire racks.
